typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		Date as string,
		{Foundation Name} as string,
		Org as string,
		Env as string,
		Space as string,
		{App Name} as string,
		{Deprecation Date} as string,
		ShortAppId as string,
		{Application Name} as string,
		RemedyId as string,
		AppStatus as string,
		AuNumber as string,
		AUOwner as string,
		TechManager as string,
		BusinessAUNumber as string,
		Manager_1 as string,
		Manager_2 as string,
		Manager_3 as string,
		Manager_4 as string,
		Manager_5 as string,
		Manager_6 as string,
		Manager_7 as string,
		Manager_8 as string,
		Manager_9 as string,
		Found as string,
		{Platform Lead} as string,
		Manager as string,
		{AU BU} as string,
		LOB as string,
		Stack as string,
		{Current Droplet Buildpack Name} as string,
		{App Last Updated} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> PCFBuildPacksAllMappings
PCFBuildPacksAllMappings derive(Import_date = currentDate()) ~> ImportDate
ImportDate sink(input(
		AU_BU as string,
		AppStatus as string,
		Org as string,
		Foundation_Name as string,
		Manager_1 as string,
		Env as string,
		Manager as string,
		App_Name as string,
		AUOwner as string,
		RemedyId as string,
		Deprecation_Date as string,
		BusinessAUNumber as string,
		Buildpack_Name as string,
		Import_date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		AuNumber as string,
		LOB as string,
		Space as string,
		ShortAppId as string,
		TechManager as string,
		Application_Name as string,
		Found as string,
		Date as string,
		Manager_8 as string,
		Manager_9 as string,
		Manager_6 as string,
		Manager_7 as string,
		Manager_4 as string,
		Manager_5 as string,
		Manager_2 as string,
		Platform_Lead as string,
		Manager_3 as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		AU_BU = {AU BU},
		AppStatus,
		Org,
		Foundation_Name = {Foundation Name},
		Manager_1,
		Env,
		Manager,
		App_Name = {App Name},
		AUOwner,
		RemedyId,
		Deprecation_Date = {Deprecation Date},
		BusinessAUNumber,
		Buildpack_Name = {Current Droplet Buildpack Name},
		Import_date,
		AuNumber,
		LOB,
		Space,
		ShortAppId,
		TechManager,
		Application_Name = {Application Name},
		Found,
		Date,
		Manager_8,
		Manager_9,
		Manager_6,
		Manager_7,
		Manager_4,
		Manager_5,
		Manager_2,
		Platform_Lead = {Platform Lead},
		Manager_3)) ~> OLEDBDestination
